examples.title: Apps settings panel
examples.purpose: Canonical settings panel example with grouped ProductSection content and ready, loading, empty, and error states.

validationCommands.reason: Lists the protected exemplar stories that include the AppsPanel state matrix.
Runs the protected professional-finish exemplar suite.

examples.title: Manage apps settings panel
examples.purpose: Companion settings panel example for connected and available app sections with the same async state matrix.

validationCommands.reason: Lists the protected exemplar stories that include the ManageAppsPanel state matrix.
Runs the protected professional-finish exemplar suite.

examples.title: ProductDataView async collection
examples.purpose: Canonical ProductDataView fixture for agents that need a heading-owned collection with ready, loading, empty, and error states.

validationCommands.reason: Runs ProductComposition tests for ProductDataView state routing.
Exercises Storybook visual coverage when the storybook suite is selected.

examples.title: Template browser page shell
examples.purpose: Web app ProductPageShell example for a full page surface with stable heading and main region.

validationCommands.reason: Runs web visual coverage for template browser and related app surfaces.

examples.title: ProductPageShell with sidebar and footer
examples.purpose: Storybook fixture that demonstrates the shell's sidebar, main, and footer slots without hand-rolled viewport wrappers.

validationCommands.reason: Runs ProductPageShell tests for sidebar and footer slots.
Exercises Storybook visual coverage when the storybook suite is selected.

examples.title: AlertDialog destructive confirmation
examples.purpose: Canonical destructive confirmation story set with trigger, cancel, confirm, focus, and blocked Escape behavior.

validationCommands.reason: Runs widget accessibility coverage for rendered interactive surfaces.
Exercises Storybook visual coverage when the storybook suite is selected.

deferredCategories.reason: No protected canonical example currently demonstrates unavailable or permission-denied product state recovery.
requiredBeforePromotion: Add a protected source or story fixture with accessible title, cause, and recovery affordance.
Connect the fixture to a route entry and validation command.

deferredCategories.reason: No protected canonical example currently demonstrates dense dashboard scanning, comparison, and repeated actions.
requiredBeforePromotion: Add a protected product or Storybook fixture that uses composition primitives for dense operational data.
Validate responsive layout and focus order before adding it to route recommendations.

deferredCategories.reason: No protected canonical example currently demonstrates form validation with accessible field-level and summary errors.
requiredBeforePromotion: Add a protected form fixture with labels, descriptions, invalid state, and recovery copy.
Validate keyboard, screen-reader, and visual coverage before making it a gold example.
